description_long: This object depicts a highly distorted adult pedestrian figure, with elongated and unnaturally stretched limbs and torso. The head is partially visible, adorned with a headband, and the face is somewhat obscured by the warped geometry. The upper body appears to be wearing a sleeveless top, while the lower body is clad in a skirt or dress, with the legs and feet extended in an exaggerated manner. The arms are also stretched, with one arm raised and the other bent at an odd angle. The overall form is surreal and abstract, with the body and clothing textures stretched across the surface, creating a visually confusing appearance. The figure is not in a natural human posture and appears to be the result of a severe mesh or texture deformation.
description: A highly distorted adult pedestrian figure with elongated limbs, warped torso, and stretched clothing textures, resulting in an abstract and surreal appearance.
description_view_0: The figure's upper body and head are most visible, with one arm raised and the torso and limbs stretched horizontally.
description_view_1: The side view emphasizes the extreme elongation of the torso and the bent, extended legs, with the head partially visible.
description_view_2: The back and lower body are prominent, showing the skirt or dress and the stretched legs, with the head turned away.
description_view_3: The figure's legs and feet are most visible, with the body and arms appearing twisted and elongated in a dramatic fashion.
attribute_clothing_type: sleeveless top and knee-length skirt or dress
attribute_posture: unnaturally stretched and distorted, with limbs and torso elongated
